features.name: array_get on descending aggregate constant with induction variable
features.description: Code should include an hw.array_get operation that accesses an hw.aggregate_constant with a descending arithmetic pattern (e.g., [n-1, n-2, ..., 1, 0]) using a for-loop induction variable that iterates from 0 to n-1
features.snippet: hw.array_get %5[%i] : !hw.array<3xi2>, i2 where %5 = hw.aggregate_constant [-2 : i2, 1 : i2, 0 : i2]

features.name: for loop with induction variable indexing multiple descending arrays
features.description: Code should include a for loop where an induction variable indexes into multiple aggregate constants with descending patterns, creating opportunities for canonicalization into simpler expressions
features.snippet: sv.for %i = %c0_i2 to %c-1_i2 step %c1_i2 : i2 { %6 = hw.array_get %5[%i] : !hw.array<3xi2>, i2 %8 = hw.array_get %7[%i] : !hw.array<3xi2>, i2 }
